script.openingLine: Portugal meet Croatia in the round of 32 at Toronto Stadium.

moments.spokenLine: Portugal meet Croatia in the round of 32 at Toronto Stadium, and the replay is under way.
moments.explainer: The match begins with Portugal and Croatia facing one another in the round of 32.

moments.spokenLine: RUBEN DIAS is shown a card for Portugal.
moments.explainer: This is Portugal's first recorded booking of the match.

moments.spokenLine: Portugal 0–0 Croatia at the interval; neither side has broken through.
moments.explainer: The score is level at half-time, with no goals separating the teams.

moments.spokenLine: Ivan PERISIC scores for Croatia, and the verified score moves to 0–1.
moments.explainer: Croatia take the lead, changing the match from level to Portugal trailing.

moments.spokenLine: Luka MODRIC is shown a card for Croatia.
moments.explainer: Croatia receive a booking while holding their 0–1 lead.

moments.spokenLine: CRISTIANO RONALDO scores for Portugal, and the verified score moves to 1–1.
moments.explainer: Portugal draw level, erasing Croatia's lead.

moments.spokenLine: GONCALO RAMOS scores for Portugal, and the verified score moves to 2–1.
moments.explainer: Portugal move ahead late, completing the decisive swing in the score.

moments.spokenLine: Ivan PERISIC is shown a card for Croatia.
moments.explainer: Croatia receive a booking after Portugal have moved in front.

moments.spokenLine: Portugal 2–1 Croatia. Portugal complete the turnaround.
moments.explainer: The final score confirms Portugal's victory after trailing 0–1.

chapters.text: At kick-off, Portugal meet Croatia in the round of 32 at Toronto Stadium, and the replay is under way.
In the 17th minute, RUBEN DIAS is shown a card for Portugal.
At half-time, Portugal 0–0 Croatia at the interval; neither side has broken through.
In the 53rd minute, Ivan PERISIC scores for Croatia, and the verified score moves to 0–1.
In the 59th minute, Luka MODRIC is shown a card for Croatia.
In the 68th minute, CRISTIANO RONALDO scores for Portugal, and the verified score moves to 1–1.
In the 4th minute of second-half stoppage time, GONCALO RAMOS scores for Portugal, and the verified score moves to 2–1.
In the 8th minute of second-half stoppage time, Ivan PERISIC is shown a card for Croatia.
At full-time, Portugal 2–1 Croatia. Portugal complete the turnaround.
